title: Mostop RC Bulldozer Toy 1/16 Scale 9 Channel RC Front Loader Tractor Fully Functional 2.4Ghz Remote Control Bulldozer RC Construction Vehicles Truck Toy Gift with Light and Sound for Kids 8+
features: [9 Channel Full Functional] Mostop remote control construction bulldozer toy is with 9 channels, it can go forward/backward, turn left/right, turn on/off the sound and light, raise/lower front loader and rear ripper.

[2.4 G Remote Control Excavator] 2.4Ghz high frequency make it longer control distance range, about 100 feet, automatically pairing and support multiplayer run the rc bulldozer toy together at the same time without interference.

[Simulation Detailed Design] Designed with simulation driving cab with flashing light and the sound of engine working, hydraulics liftable leveling blade, rotatable ripper and dozer blade, performing flexible and simulated.

[7.4V Rechargeable Battery] Come with 2* 7.4V 600mah rechargeable battery, 3-4 hour charging time can support 15-20 minute playing time. Please remember to charge it before the first play, it may be run out during the delivery.

[Good Gift Bulldozer toy] 1/16 scale body, 14.8" x 7.7" x 6.1" large dimensions, ABS vehicle body, metal ripper, roof of cab and bracing pieces, rubber tracks make it more durable. It is a wonderful Birthday present for 6, 7, 8, 9, 10 year old kids.
description: Product Description Mostop RC Bulldozer 1/16 Scale 9 Channel RC Front Loader Tractor for Kids Adults 9 Channel Mostop remote control front loader can go forward/backward, turn left/right, turn on/off the sound and light, raise and lower the loader and ripper. 2.4G remote control 2.4G high frequency support longer control distance and multiplayer run the bulldozer toy together at the same time without interference. Simulated Design Shovel Loader Simulation driving cab with flashing light and the sound of engine working, hydraulics liftable leveling blade, rotatable ripper and dozer blade, performing flexible and simulated. Detailed Designed Front Loader ABS vehicle body, metal ripper, roof of cab and bracing pieces, rubber tracks make it more durable. Lift-able Dozer Blade Metal Ripper Rubber Track Simulated Light & Sound RC bulldozer toy is designed with simulated sound and light, which make it look like a real construction vehicle. 2.4Ghz Remote ontrol Automatically pairing, more than 60 meters remote control range, 2.4Ghz high frequency make it no interference with other signal. 9 Channel Full Function Mostop Bulldozer toy can go forward/ backward, turn left/right, turn on/off the sound and light, raise and lower the loader and ripper. Packing List 1* bulldozer toy 1* rechargeable battery 2* remote control (2* AA batteries are required, not included) 1* USB charger 1* user manual Specification Product Size: 37.59 x 19.56 x 15.49 cm; Product Weight: 1.36 Kilograms Product Scale: 1:16 Scale Material: ABS + Metal + Rubber Remote: 2.4Ghz radio control Charging Time: 3 - 4 hours Playing Time: 15 - 20 Minutes Recommend Age: 6+
